original_query: select sum(distinct deptno), count(distinct deptno), bit_or(deptno) from emp;
rewritten_query:
SELECT SUM(deptno), COUNT(deptno), BIT_OR(deptno) 
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT deptno FROM emp) AS d;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Optimize the query by computing distinct deptno values once in a subquery, then applying aggregates on the smaller result set. This avoids redundant DISTINCT operations for SUM and COUNT.
